title: Sethome
body:
# Sethome This plugin works with Spigot,PaperMC.
You can set your Home.
I'm Japanese and my English is not good. Sorry.
If you find any bugs, go to this link : https://forms.gle/pkYDEPaoLf1NjMLT7 ## How to use: - /sethome [name of home] - set home. - /home [name of home] - teleport to home. - /delhome [name of home] - delete a home. - /homelist - see a list of your homes. - /rehome [name of home] [name of new home] - allows you to rename the home. ## Caution: - If you die, you will not return to home. Use /home to return.
## Known bugs Not yet discovered.
